meta.methodology: Policy briefs are generated from aggregated RSS feed alerts. LLM-assisted summaries use GPT-4o-mini when OPENAI_API_KEY is set; otherwise rule-based summaries are produced from headline aggregation.

briefs.title: Affordable Housing Policy Brief — April 2026
briefs.summary: Recent news coverage on affordable housing in Colorado covers 80 item(s). Notable headlines include: Front Range cities oppose Democratic proposal to permit lot‑splitting as a path to affordable housing - Denver Gazette; Pennrose opens 75-unit affordable housing with child care in Longmont - ColoradoBiz; Trump-championed affordable housing credit overhaul stalls amid financing bottlenecks - therealdeal.com. Coverage spans: Statewide, Colorado, Denver.
briefs.implications: Policymakers should monitor affordable housing trends in Colorado. This data cluster suggests active public discourse and potential legislative or market developments.
